title: CTM360 CyberBlindSpot Connector
description: External import connector for CTM360 CyberBlindSpot Digital Risk Protection platform. Imports incidents, malware logs, breached credentials, card leaks, and domain protection findings.
short_description: Imports CTM360 CyberBlindSpot digital risk protection data into OpenCTI, including incidents, malware logs, breached credentials, card leaks, and domain protection findings.
